title: Campo Avejar meeting and input distribution
content: We successfully conducted the General Meeting of Campo Avejar Farmers Irrigator Ass. and Distribution of Inputs given by the Department of Agriculture to the Farmers. Many thanks to Ma'am MA Lora Laureles Destreza, Sir Luz Guevarra (Irrigated Tech and Rice banner), and Sir Anchet Mendoza. We also recognize the support and help of the National Irrigation Administration (NIA), Ma'am Engr. Mavic Ramos Dinglasan, Sir Engr. Blue-kevin Borreo, Ma'am Wilma Valenzuela Granados, and the Operation Team in Palico led by Sir Arnel Macaraig. Thank you so much.

title: Second day farmer inputs support
content: 2nd Day. Kami ay nagpapasalamat Nasugbu Agriculture sa mga natanggap ng mga magsasaka ng abono at binhi kay MA Ma'am Lora Laureles Destreza, Luz Guevarra, at sa Ahensya ng National Irrigation Administration (NIA) sa patuloy na pagtulong at sa pagpapagamit ng truck sa Palico River Irrigation System Irrigator Association Federation PRISIAF na binubuo ng Irrigators Association. Maraming salamat sa aming Engr. Manager Mavic Ramos Dinglasan, Engr. Blue-kevin Borreo, Ma'am Wilma Valenzuela Granados, Operation Team WM Arnel Macaraig, Danilo Mercado, Flave Caraig, Mario Desacola, Dan Ny, Fidel Mendoza, and Gina Gallardo Cabali.

title: Fertilizer and seed assistance
content: Kami ay nagpapasalamat sa Nasugbu Agriculture sa mga natanggap ng mga magsasaka ng abono at binhi kay MA Ma'am Lora Laureles Destreza, Luz Guevarra, at sa Ahensya ng National Irrigation Administration (NIA) sa patuloy na pagtulong at sa pagpapagamit ng truck sa Palico River Irrigation System Irrigator Association Federation PRISIAF. Maraming salamat sa aming Engr. Manager Mavic Ramos Dinglasan, Engr. Blue-kevin Borreo, Ma'am Wilma Valenzuela Granados, Operation Team WM Arnel Macaraig, Danilo Mercado, Flave Caraig, Mario Desacola, Dan Ny, Fidel Mendoza, and Gina Gallardo Cabali.

title: DAR climate-resilient palay production planning
content: Planning for the Major Program given by the Department of Agrarian Reform (DAR): Enhancing Climate Resilient and Gender-Inclusive Palay Production in Hacienda Palico Agrarian Reform Community (ARC), Nasugbu, Batangas under the Major Crop Based Farm Productivity (MCBFP) Support Project. Nasugbu Farmers and Fisherfolks Agriculture thanks Ma'am Adora San Jose Ocampo, Ma'am Bianca Casalla Dimailig, and the NFFAC Family including Eduardo Rubio, Apolinaria Villanueva, Lorena Sangalang, Juancho Maningat, Reymond Bauyon, Gemma Barlaan, Katrina Badlis, Nerresa Sumanguid, Linda Concepcion, Angeli Delmo Magnaye, Eyangam Eij Do, Gina Gallardo Cabali, Ariel Sumaguid, Walter C. Duenas, and Dan Ny. #highlight #everyoneactive #DepartmentofAgrarianReformPH

title: BSU-Nasugbu students interview NFFAC
content: Students from Batangas State University-Nasugbu scheduled an interview to discuss the digitalization system of the Nasugbu Farmers and Fisherfolks Agriculture Cooperative (NFFAC). Thank you Sir. David Alfred Gludo and the team. #BSU #everyoneactive #highlight
